etymology.description: 匸 (a container or enclosure) + 品 (many people) = people inside an area -> district; region; area
etymology.interpretation: The character represents many people (品) within a boundary or enclosure (匸), intuitively suggesting a designated area or district where people congregate and interact.
etymology.simplification: 區 (qū, "district; region; area") was simplified by replacing 品 (pǐn, "goods") with 乂 (yì, "to govern"), reducing the complexity while retaining the structure of 匸 (xì, "enclosure").

examples.chinese: 这个区域的空气非常清新(這個區域的空氣非常清新)。
examples.pinyin: Zhège qūyù de kōngqì fēicháng qīngxīn.
examples.english: The air in this area is very fresh.

examples.chinese: 我们住在城市的商业区(我們住在城市的商業區)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen zhù zài chéngshì de shāngyèqū.
examples.english: We live in the commercial district of the city.

examples.chinese: 该地区以其风景优美而闻名(該地區以其風景優美而聞名)。
examples.pinyin: Gāi dìqū yǐ qí fēngjǐng yōuměi ér wénmíng.
examples.english: The region is known for its beautiful scenery.
